support_assistant_enabled.title: Enable Support Assistant
support_assistant_enabled.description: When enabled, the Support Assistant is available to all users environment-wide.

support_assistant_agent_project_id.title: Agent Project
support_assistant_agent_project_id.description: Project containing the support agent. Leave empty to use the hidden support project.

support_assistant_agent_id.title: Active Support Agent
support_assistant_agent_id.description: Agent or pipeline that handles support requests.

support_assistant_welcome_message.title: Welcome Message
support_assistant_welcome_message.description: Initial message shown when users open the Support Assistant.
support_assistant_welcome_message.default: Hello! How can I help you today?

support_assistant_name.title: Assistant Name
support_assistant_name.description: Display name for the Support Assistant.
